info.title: Fluide Payroll API
info.description: Payroll runs, payslip generation, validators, and async payroll processing. Integrate after employee records exist in HR. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT (from token exchange), X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

bearer.description: Developer access token from POST /api/v1/developer-access/token. Paste the raw JWT; Mintlify adds the Bearer prefix.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret — send only to POST /api/v1/developer-access/token. Never use on product routes.

ruleType.description: Rule type key used by payroll strategies (e.g., CNPS, TAX, PENSION, PAYE, NHF, NSITF, ITF)

configJson.description: Frozen config payload used for deterministic computation

upperBound.description: Upper bound (major currency units), null for open-ended bracket

rate.description: Marginal rate for the bracket (fractional, e.g. 0.05 for 5%)

baseOffset.description: Optional base offset to compute tax quickly

deductionCode.description: Deduction code used by payroll strategies

clientIdempotencyKey.description: Client-supplied idempotency key for off-cycle runs (dedupes retries)

forceRecalculate.description: If true, recompute when prior run failed/processing (immutability preserved after validation)

employeeIds.description: Payroll employee UUIDs to include. Omit for all active employees. Must match an existing run unless forceRecalculate is true.

cycleId.description: Reusable payroll cycle template to seed period and roster

payDate.description: Pay date (ISO date); defaults to periodEnd

clientIdempotencyKey.description: Client idempotency key for safe retries

forceRecalculate.description: If true, recompute when prior run failed/processing (immutability preserved after validation)

employeeIds.description: Payroll employee UUIDs to include. Omit for all active employees. Must match an existing run unless forceRecalculate is true.

cycleId.description: Reusable payroll cycle template to seed period and roster

employeeIds.description: Only validate these payroll employee IDs (payslips for others are removed). Omit for all lines.

approverSubjectIds.description: Optional override approver list (FluideAuth user ids). Omit to use the company policy.

comment.description: Optional comment stored with the approval decision.

sourceWalletId.description: Company FluidePay wallet to debit when all selected payslips share the same payout currency, or as default when sourceWalletIdsByPayoutCurrency omits that currency. Omit to auto-resolve the default OPERATING company wallet per payout currency (FluidePay internal API).

sourceWalletIdsByPayoutCurrency.description: Treasury wallet UUID per payout ISO currency (e.g. { "XAF": "…", "NGN": "…" }). Required when the selection spans multiple payout currencies.

payslipIds.description: Only disburse these payslip IDs. Omit to disburse all PROCESSED/FAILED payslips.

includedEmployeeIds.description: Planned subset of payroll employee IDs (DRAFT only). Used when processing this run.
